key_turning_points.title: Pivoted into Zeppelins and board conversion, but John's discount stack still matured
John funded Miner and overtook Banker while his late-game card engine remained intact
Passed after terraforming instead of liquidating the rest of the generation into board VP

counterfactuals.change: After finishing Mars in Gen 11, continue the rest of the generation and convert MC into one more standard city plus follow-up greenery instead of passing
Treat AI Central plus Mass Converter plus Quantum Extractor as a hard closure emergency by Gen 8 and reserve more Gen 9-10 cash for guaranteed closing actions
Concede Banker earlier once John overtook the category and redirect one award/conversion window into direct board VP

rule_updates: If Mars becomes fully terraformed during the action phase, then assume the rest of the generation is still live until the prompt proves otherwise and liquidate all remaining MC/plants/steel before passing.
If John has AI Central plus Mass Converter and adds another science or space discount by Gen 8, then reserve Gen 9-10 actions primarily for guaranteed closure and board VP, not additional setup.
If a funded award trajectory flips by Gen 10, then stop defending sunk-cost pride and convert the remaining windows into guaranteed points instead of leaving the category to drift away.

tool_mismatches.expected: After Mars is terraformed, continue taking remaining actions in the generation until no profitable conversions remain
tool_mismatches.actual: Treated post-terraform state as if only final greenery cleanup remained and passed with large MC and steel stranded
tool_mismatches.mitigation: After any terraforming-complete action, explicitly verify whether the generation is still live and exhaust all positive-EV conversions before passing
